mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for FEDFUNDS changes remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample hit rate falls below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60d returns with a t-statistic above 1.96, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the industrial production index exceeding 0.5% indicates immediate supply-side contraction that triggers short-term equity sell-offs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Negative 5d returns occur in fewer than 40% of triggered instances during tightening regimes, or rolling Rank IC drops below -0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly gains in total nonfarm payrolls above 150,000 confirm robust economic momentum that supports corporate earnings growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth above 150k correlates negatively or neutrally with 20d forward returns over a 5-year out-of-sample period, with Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Rising core inflation combined with slowing real GDP growth creates stagflationary pressures that force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition of rising CPIAUCSL and slowing GDPC1 fails to predict negative 60d returns, with out-of-sample accuracy below 55% or interaction p-value > 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly housing starts figure falling below 900,000 units signals a sharp housing market downturn that immediately drags down construction and related equity sectors, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST falls below 900k, or the signal's predictive power vanishes in a walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising unemployment and stagnant payroll growth indicates hidden labor market weakness that erodes consumer confidence, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises MoM and PAYEMS growth < 100k
failure_condition: The divergence condition fails to predict negative 20d returns with statistical significance (t-stat < 1.65), or hit rate remains below 50% across multiple recovery cycles.
